name: omp-send-context
displayName: OMP Send Context for VS Code
description: Send VS Code selections to Oh My Pi with Ctrl+Alt+K.

claimIdeContextOnFocus.description: On Linux, claim IDE context automatically after this terminal receives an xterm focus report.

commands.title: OMP Context: Insert Agent Handoff Packet

configuration.title: OMP Send Context for VS Code

ompContext.insertMode.description: What the Ctrl+Alt+K command sends. agentHandoff sends the bounded handoff packet by default; editorContext keeps the minimal file/selection prompt.

ompContext.contentMode.description: How selected text is included in editor context and handoff packets. Inline includes the reference plus selected text as a fenced code block; reference sends only @file#Lx-Ly so OMP can read the file.

ompContext.endpoint.description: Override the OMP context bridge endpoint. Empty means read ~/.omp/agent/editor-context-bridge.json, then fall back to http://127.0.0.1:47687.

ompContext.handoffMaxBytes.description: Advanced handoff-only maximum bytes inserted when ompContext.insertMode is agentHandoff or the explicit handoff command is used.

ompContext.handoffMaxDiagnostics.description: Advanced handoff-only maximum VS Code diagnostics included when ompContext.insertMode is agentHandoff or the explicit handoff command is used.

scripts.test: npm run check-types && node --import tsx --test test/*.test.ts test/*.test.mjs
